# Copilot Instructions for This Repository

## Language and tone

- Use British English spelling and phrasing.
- Keep communication concise, practical, and engineering-focused.

## Profile and identity

- Refer to the profile owner as Moleman.
- Do not include or infer real-name personal details unless explicitly requested.

## Technical emphasis

- Treat Terraform and PowerShell as primary expertise.
- Treat TypeScript and Python as active learning areas.
- Prioritise platform engineering, Azure, Azure DevOps, MCP tooling, and automation context when proposing changes.

## Content preferences

- Prefer clear, professional README and documentation style.
- Avoid overstatement of expertise in TypeScript or Python.
- Ground wording in repository and organisation context where possible.
